plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了人类与机器之间的关系，认为从历史角度看，人类一直与机器和技术紧密相连。它可能讨论社交媒体时代如何重新定义这种关系，以及技术如何影响我们的身份和沟通方式。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the relationship between humans and machines, suggesting that historically, humans have always been closely connected with machines and technology. It likely discusses how the social media era redefines this relationship and how technology affects our identity and communication methods.
research_direction_zh: 研究社交媒体时代人类与技术的关系演变，探讨数字身份、人机交互以及技术如何塑造社会沟通模式。
research_direction_en: Examining the evolution of human-technology relationships in the social media era, exploring digital identity, human-machine interaction, and how technology shapes social communication patterns.
